flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pine Technical & Community College fell 31% between 2006 and 2009 (45.1% → 31.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pine Technical & Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pine Technical & Community College fell 44% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $4.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pine Technical & Community College fell 22% between 2017 and 2020 ($18.5k → $14.4k).
